auto.name: Auto
auto.description: Automatic pose discipline where the model selects the safest pose based on intent, shot, wardrobe, and fit priority, avoiding distortion and preserving garment readability.
auto.prompt_fragment: a natural fashion pose automatically chosen to match the intent while preserving fit and silhouette

fit_preserving_neutral_stance.name: Fit preserving neutral stance
fit_preserving_neutral_stance.description: Primary e-commerce and fit-validation baseline. Upright posture, weight evenly distributed, arms relaxed, no twist or bend. Maximizes clarity of silhouette, lengths, and construction lines.
fit_preserving_neutral_stance.prompt_fragment: fit-preserving neutral standing pose, straight posture, weight evenly distributed, arms relaxed, no twist, full outfit clearly readable

commercial_front_facing.name: Commercial front facing
commercial_front_facing.description: Commercial front-facing stance designed for catalog and marketplace clarity. Subtle contrapposto allowed but remains symmetrical enough to keep hem, collar, and waistband lines legible.
commercial_front_facing.prompt_fragment: front-facing commercial pose with clean symmetry, slight natural stance, outfit lines and proportions clearly readable

three_quarter_balanced_stance.name: Three quarter balanced stance
three_quarter_balanced_stance.description: Balanced three-quarter stance showing front and side simultaneously. Preserves garment geometry while adding depth and editorial sophistication without body distortion.
three_quarter_balanced_stance.prompt_fragment: balanced three-quarter standing pose showing front and side, minimal distortion, clear garment structure

static_editorial_stillness.name: Static editorial stillness
static_editorial_stillness.description: Luxury editorial stillness. The body is composed and nearly motionless, with deliberate posture and controlled expression. Emphasizes presence, attitude, and premium restraint while keeping fit readable.
static_editorial_stillness.prompt_fragment: still editorial pose with composed posture and minimal movement, strong presence, outfit remains clean and readable

editorial_weight_shift.name: Editorial weight shift
editorial_weight_shift.description: Classic high-fashion weight shift (contrapposto) with controlled hip and shoulder offset. Creates sculptural silhouette while keeping key seams, closures, and hem alignment legible.
editorial_weight_shift.prompt_fragment: editorial weight-shift stance with controlled contrapposto, sculptural silhouette, garment lines still readable

walking_proof_step.name: Walking proof step
walking_proof_step.description: Single controlled walking step used to demonstrate drape, swing, and real fabric behavior. Movement is restrained to avoid motion blur and preserve garment shape cues.
walking_proof_step.prompt_fragment: controlled walking step mid-stride to show natural drape and hem movement, minimal blur, outfit remains readable

motion_continuation.name: Motion continuation
motion_continuation.description: Continuous motion moment (walk-through or gentle turn) that feels candid and cinematic. Keeps movement smooth and physically plausible while maintaining silhouette readability.
motion_continuation.prompt_fragment: smooth motion continuation moment, candid but controlled, garments move naturally while staying readable

seated_fit_readable.name: Seated fit readable
seated_fit_readable.description: Controlled seated posture designed to reveal waist, hip, and thigh behavior without excessive wrinkling or distortion. Useful for comfort proof and fit validation in seated scenarios.
seated_fit_readable.prompt_fragment: clean seated posture with aligned spine, garments drape naturally at waist and hips, fit remains readable

relaxed_seated_lifestyle.name: Relaxed seated lifestyle
relaxed_seated_lifestyle.description: Lifestyle seated pose with relaxed shoulders and natural slouch kept within safe limits. Communicates comfort and authenticity while protecting garment readability.
relaxed_seated_lifestyle.prompt_fragment: relaxed lifestyle seated pose with gentle natural slouch, comfort-forward, outfit remains readable and not distorted

leaning_casual_editorial.name: Leaning casual editorial
leaning_casual_editorial.description: Light lean against a wall or rail for casual editorial energy. The lean is minimal to avoid shoulder collapse and preserve jacket drape and line integrity.
leaning_casual_editorial.prompt_fragment: casual leaning pose with minimal body collapse, relaxed attitude, garment drape and lines preserved

street_style_candid_stand.name: Street style candid stand
street_style_candid_stand.description: Candid street-style standing pose. Reads like a real off-duty fashion moment, with subtle asymmetry and natural gesture while preserving silhouette and avoiding extreme bends.
street_style_candid_stand.prompt_fragment: candid street style standing pose, relaxed natural gesture, subtle asymmetry, outfit remains readable

street_style_candid_walk.name: Street style candid walk
street_style_candid_walk.description: Candid urban walk with authentic rhythm. Arms and shoulders move naturally but remain restrained enough to keep the outfit legible at mobile scale.
street_style_candid_walk.prompt_fragment: candid street style walk with natural rhythm, controlled movement, outfit remains readable at mobile scale

confidence_stance.name: Confidence stance
confidence_stance.description: Confidence-first posture used in tailoring and power dressing. Includes hands in pockets or relaxed arms that open the chest and communicate authority without aggressive posing.
confidence_stance.prompt_fragment: confident stance with open posture, relaxed shoulders, hands in pockets or relaxed arms, authoritative but not performative

back_view_construction.name: Back view construction
back_view_construction.description: Back-facing pose for construction proof: shoulder fit, back seams, length, vent behavior, and overall garment engineering from the rear view.
back_view_construction.prompt_fragment: back view fashion pose with straight posture, garment back construction clearly visible, no twist

profile_clarity_stance.name: Profile clarity stance
profile_clarity_stance.description: Clean side profile designed to show silhouette thickness, layering volume, and proportion accuracy. Avoids forward hunching to keep neckline and shoulder line correct.
profile_clarity_stance.prompt_fragment: clean side-profile pose with aligned posture, silhouette and layering volume clearly visible, minimal distortion

sport_active_ready.name: Sport active ready
sport_active_ready.description: Athletic readiness stance for activewear: grounded feet, engaged core, neutral spine. Communicates performance without extreme stretch that would misrepresent fit.
sport_active_ready.prompt_fragment: athletic ready stance with grounded feet and engaged posture, performance energy without extreme stretch, garments remain readable

sport_in_motion.name: Sport in motion
sport_in_motion.description: Controlled athletic motion (jog step, lateral step, warm-up move) to show technical fabric behavior and dynamic comfort. Movement remains crisp to avoid blur and shape loss.
sport_in_motion.prompt_fragment: controlled athletic motion moment, crisp movement with minimal blur, technical garments moving naturally while staying readable

yoga_wellness_grounded.name: Yoga wellness grounded
yoga_wellness_grounded.description: Wellness-focused grounded poses (mountain pose, gentle stretch, seated cross-leg) that communicate calm, breath, and alignment. Avoids extreme contortions that break garment fidelity.
yoga_wellness_grounded.prompt_fragment: grounded wellness pose with calm alignment, gentle stretch or steady stance, no extreme contortion, garments remain accurate

creative_composed_fashion.name: Creative composed fashion
creative_composed_fashion.description: Art-fashion and campaign creative pose that is expressive but engineered. Uses sculptural lines, negative space, and intentional asymmetry while maintaining garment readability and proportion sanity.
creative_composed_fashion.prompt_fragment: composed creative fashion pose, sculptural lines and controlled asymmetry, expressive but readable, proportions remain realistic

usage_note: Applied only when use_pose_ref is false. When use_pose_ref is true, the reference pose must be copied exactly.
